title: Market Reasoning
description: A reference-dependent editorial series about turning market signals into one consistent visual reasoning system.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes a hand-drawn editorial market mountain language; images 02-04 reuse that same layout grammar and character system while changing the reasoning layer.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Market Reasoning
en.description: A reference-dependent editorial series about turning market signals into one consistent visual reasoning system.
